mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_feedback_log (request_id, user_id, problem_id, submit_id, action_type, feedback_type, metadata_json, entry_ref_type, entry_ref_id, path_id, level_id, wrong_item_id, create_time) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{userId}, #{problemId}, #{submitId}, #{actionType}, #{feedbackType}, #{metadataJson}, #{entryRefType}, #{entryRefId}, #{pathId}, #{levelId}, #{wrongItemId}, #{createTime})
